title: SΔϕ Sovereign AI K-Gate: Korean Public Cost Priority Framework
subtitle: A Cost-Attribution Framework for Designing Sovereign AI in the Interest of the Republic of Korea and Its Citizens
description: This package defines an SΔϕ-based exception gate for sovereign AI design. It prioritizes the long-term costs borne by citizens of the Republic of Korea while explicitly separating citizen interest from government, regime, bureaucratic, and domestic incumbent interests. The framework includes a Korean Public Cost Priority Gate, anti-capture rules, public AI flattening audits, foreign infrastructure exception criteria, and AI-readable routing rules.
notes: AI-READABLE / AI-NATIVE package. Korean public cost priority framework.
